subject: [UUI] NLP for IBN helm chart
commit_message:
[UUI] NLP for IBN helm chart

NLP component added to UUI

Issue-ID: USECASEUI-525
Signed-off-by: zhaoyh6 <zhaoyh6@asiainfo.com>
